headings: b. Enrolled Parties and Excluded Parties.
text: 4. (b) Off-site fabricators, vendors, suppliers (who  do  not perform  or subcontract installation), material dealers, guard services, manufacturing representatives, janitorial services, blasting and demolition contractors, abatement contractors, environmental remediation  firms,  hazardous  material(s)  or  waste  removal  and/or transport companies, hazardous waste disposal firms and/or sites, and any other persons or organizations that make deliveries to or from the Project site.
